meaning: adj.矮林丛生的,有树荫的,有丛林的
examples: Trees grow thick and bosky all around the pool, with willows and other trees I cannot name by the path.
Amy O'Dell works out of a house in a bosky suburb 20 miles outside Atlanta.
Even if a developer were able to pay off the Nimbys, a development might not go ahead: the council might decide that a lovely view or bosky wood was worth preserving for the wider community.
